command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute 
-- Step 1: Reset ALL retail_offering customers to standard
UPDATE customers SET customerType = 'standard' WHERE customerType = 'retail_offering';

-- Step 2: Set correct customers to retail_offering based on Site Bundle billing items
UPDATE customers c
SET c.customerType = 'retail_offering'
WHERE c.externalId IN (
  SELECT DISTINCT customerExternalId FROM billing_items
  WHERE description LIKE '%Site Bundle%'
  AND customerExternalId IS NOT NULL AND customerExternalId != ''
);
